channel.title: Bootcamp on Al's Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Bootcamp on Al's Ramblings

item.title: BootCamp Session 22
item.description:
View Bootcamp Session 22 in a larger map

Total Distance: 8.15 km (5.1 mi)

Total Time: 1:24:24

Moving Time: 55:52

Average Speed: 5.80 km/h (3.6 mi/h)

Average Moving Speed: 8.75 km/h (5.4 mi/h)

Max Speed: 68.74 km/h (42.7 mi/h)

Min Elevation: 24 m (79 ft)

Max Elevation: 88 m (289 ft)

Elevation Gain: 99 m (323 ft)

Max Grade: 2 %

Min Grade: -6 %

Recorded: Sat Dec 04 07:12:12 AEDT 2010

item.title: Friday exercise
item.description: Friday night here and my fellow boot campers will have already completed their Saturday morning 1:30 hour session, my session not as long;

item.title: Bootcamp on holiday
item.description: Got time for another run tonight 6Kms 40 minutes. My tracker didn’t work so no map.

item.title: Bootcamp on Holiday
item.description: So I while I’m on holiday I know my fellow boot campers are sweating it out on the rowing machines, or the bicycle, or ski erg or whatever has been dreamed up.

item.title: Bootcamp update
item.description: Sessions 4 & 5 this week and my last session before we head off for two weeks in the USA. A two week absence in the middle of this camp was every reason I needed not to to it, but rather than put it off I choose to do it and work around it. I had good solid workout at both sessions but I need to work on pushing myself more. Weight in this morning at 103.45Kg thats 2KG down on my start weight, so a positive move.

item.title: 25 Oct Food diary
item.description: Some perhaps useful information to go with what is essentially navel gazing on my part here is a hand Kilojoule and Nutrient Calculator, and some tips for weight loss.

item.title: 26 Oct Food Diary
item.description: Again trying to add some value here to these post, Lunch today was Tuna Pasta Salad I added some pine nuts and as I had some to hand used rocket instead of parsley.

item.title: Boot camp Session 4
item.description: First full outdoor session and first 1.5 hour session. Sunday morning and yes I’m sore, although to be honest if you asked me yesterday I thought I would have been worse, but there is always tomorrow :-)

item.title: Boot camp Session 2 & 3
item.description: Session 2 of boot camp saw some more testing, this time on the rowing machine. The stats read

item.title: Boot camp Day 1
item.description: Ergfit boot camp started today. It’s not the first boot camp I have done so I kinda know what I’ve signed up for , I think, different crew so it will know doubt have different challenges.
